name: SubMalevolent Grace
description: Maliwan SMGs always spawn with an element, offering strong status effect chance and improved damage over time. SubMalevolent Grace can roll with two barrel styles that change its handling: - Tediore (light): faster reloads and better accuracy, but lower damage. - Bandit or Scav (heavy): higher base damage, but worse accuracy.
notes: SubMalevolent Grace is a random drop from any appropriate loot source.
